title: tragus elatior
intro: Tragus elatior, also known as the greater burdock or greater thistle, is a biennial or perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragus elatior include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Tragus elatior can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in skincare products due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
